_ref: CMIP7 Guidance on Grids v2.0 doi:10.5281/zenodo.19346578; nominal_resolution algorithm from CMIP6 Global Attributes v6.2.8 Appendix 2
_scope: Covers output/reporting grids. EMD documents computational grids only — output grids are out of EMD scope.

interface_variables.use_ocean_grid_if: CF standard_name includes 'sea' or 'sea ice'; OR cell_methods includes 'where sea', 'where sea_ice', 'where ice_free_sea'

nominal_resolution.rule: mandatory global attribute in all CMIP7 output files; calculated before writing

algorithm.step1: For each grid cell find d_max = max distance (km) between any pair of cell vertices
algorithm.step2: Compute area-weighted mean of d_max over all relevant cells
algorithm.regular_latlon_shortcut: d_max ≈ 1.2854 * r_earth * Δφ_rad  (r_earth = 6371 km); e.g. 0.5° grid → ~71.5 km → '50 km'
algorithm.standard_grid_exception: 1×1° grid (360×180, lon centred at 0.5°E) → '1x1 degree' not '100 km'

grid_labels.format: opaque unique label e.g. g101, g134
grid_labels.rule: all native and output grids registered in EMD repo before writing output; label used in filenames, directory paths, and as mandatory global attribute
